svg.title: Phase 3 – dashboard review and export
svg.desc: User redirected to dashboard after job done. Each interval shown one at a time with thumbnail. User can keep, discard, or modify trim points. Kept intervals sent to export endpoint which runs FFmpeg per interval on original video, produces downloadable file.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What interval data is fetched from Redis for the dashboard?')
sendPrompt('How should the thumbnail be generated for each interval?')
sendPrompt('What trim controls should the modify UI show?')
sendPrompt('Does discard delete anything from storage?')
sendPrompt('What is the exact FFmpeg command to cut a clip by timestamps?')
sendPrompt('When should we concat vs zip the clips?')
sendPrompt('When should we concat vs zip the clips?')
sendPrompt('How should the download link be served — presigned URL?')

svg.text: video.mp4 must still exist in storage at this point
